overview: Bitty Builder is a mobile-first Tetris game themed around the Bitty on ICP mascot with Internet Identity login, weekly/all-time leaderboards, $BITTYICP wallet integration, a real-money DUELS feature, and an animated tournament announcement system.
features: Classic Tetris with gesture-only mobile controls
Internet Identity login with unique nicknames
DUELS: wager $BITTYICP against other players with escrow and automatic payouts
Animated tournament plane banner with prize details
Admin panel for leaderboard and tournament management
Social score sharing to X with tracking
